summary: Frontend-only testing of BDapps Digital Builder Content & Data Management layer. Tested sidebar nav, /my-apps page with 3 seeded apps, builder flow up to Step 4, CMS sections (Overview/Products/Banners/Orders/Doctors/Appointments/Reviews/Customers/Pages/Media/Settings/Reports), Settings Danger Zone confirmation, and core navigation. Most CMS pages render correctly with seeded Bangladeshi content. Core functionality works.

ui_bugs.issue: Test context indicated data-testid='web-template-card-{id}' but actual is 'template-card-{id}'. Use 'template-card-web-ecom' etc. and 'use-template-{id}' button.
Visible text 'Changes live · 2 hr ago' renders correctly, but element lacks data-testid='sync-indicator'. Add for testability.
Up/down ▲▼ reorder buttons visible but no data-testid attributes (e.g. banner-move-up-{id}/banner-move-down-{id}). Drag-reorder works visually.
Could not locate data-testid='skip-sample-data' on the Skip button. Step 4 was not reached reliably in test (the Design Style modal advance path needs investigation).
Could not verify section nav data-testid prefix (expected content-section-* or section-nav-*). Add data-testid to each section nav item with completion dots.

integration_issues.issue: After clicking 'Use Template' → Design modal opens → Continue → Customize. Could not reliably advance to Step 4 in automated test; flow needs verification that 'Preview My App →' button advances to ContentManager (not directly to Preview/Launch). Multiple template testid prefix confusion may also be affecting test reliability.

issues: External font (api.fontshare.com/cabinet-grotesk) blocked by CORS — fonts fail to load; falls back to system fonts. Not blocking but should self-host or use Google Fonts.

verified_working: Sidebar 'My Apps' link exists between Digital and Add-Ons with NEW badge
/my-apps shows 3 seeded apps (APP-ROBIMART, APP-DESHISPICE, APP-MEDILIFE) with status badges (Live/In Review), stats, all 4 action buttons (manage-content/dashboard/settings/view-live)
5-step progress bar visible (Choose Template → Design Style → Customize → Add Your Content → Preview & Launch)
CMS Layout topbar shows app name, status badge, 'Changes live · X' text, 'View Live Site' button
CMS Sidebar shows context-aware nav (e-commerce: Overview/Products/Banners/Orders/Customers/Reviews/Pages/Media/Reports/Settings; health: Doctors/Appointments)
CMS Overview: stats cards (Total Orders/Revenue/Active Products/Customers), Quick Actions, Recent Activity feed with timestamps
CMS Products: table with image/name/price/stock/status + Add Product button + Stock Alerts visible
CMS Banners: cards with image, ▲▼ reorder buttons, CTR/Views/Clicks analytics, Add Banner
CMS Orders: All/New/Processing/Shipped/Delivered/Cancelled filter tabs, order table with view actions
CMS Reviews/Customers/Pages/Media/Reports: all routes load without errors
CMS Settings: 5 sub-tabs (Store Info/Notifications/Domain & SEO/Integrations/Danger Zone) present
Settings Danger Zone: requires typing exact app name (RobiMart BD) to enable Delete App button — verified Delete App button disabled by default
'Manage on the go' promo card at bottom of CMS sidebar
Storage meter (Storage 0.0 / 500 MB) visible in CMS sidebar
No page errors / no uncaught exceptions across all visited pages
action_items: Add data-testid='sync-indicator' to the CMS topbar sync element
Add data-testid to Banner reorder buttons (banner-move-up-{id}, banner-move-down-{id})
Add data-testid='skip-sample-data' to the Skip — Use Sample Data button in ContentManager Step 4
Add data-testid to ContentManager section nav items (e.g., content-section-{key}) and completion dots
Update agent context note: template card testid is 'template-card-{id}' not 'web-template-card-{id}'; use button is 'use-template-{id}'
Verify Step 4 ContentManager is actually shown for Web/Android template flows (manual smoke test recommended — could not reliably automate)
Self-host Cabinet Grotesk font or switch CDN — current api.fontshare.com fails CORS
critical_code_review_comments: AppContext relies on localStorage with no schema versioning — future content schema changes will break existing saved state. Consider a 'bdapps_schema_version' key with migration.
Several CMS pages may share repeated table/panel layouts — consider extracting common Table/SlidePanel components if not already done (DRY).
External font blocked by CORS produces console errors on every page load — should be self-hosted or switched.
seed_data_creation: None — all 3 apps (RobiMart BD, Deshi Spice Kitchen, Medilife Clinic) are pre-seeded in AppContext localStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login works. /my-apps and all CMS sections render fine for 3 seeded apps. The hard-to-test part is Digital Builder Step 4 ContentManager — flow is: Login → /digital → click 'Web App Builder' tab → click [data-testid^='use-template-'] → Design Style modal opens → pick style → 'Continue →' → Customize form → fill required fields → 'Preview My App →' button → should reach Step 4 Content. The 'Use Template' button is inside the template card. data-testid prefix is 'template-card-' not 'web-template-card-'. Welcome modal dismissal: localStorage.setItem('bdapps-digital-welcomed', '1'). Sync indicator and several Step 4 elements lack data-testid — need to add for reliable testing.
rca: Test could not reliably reach Step 4 Content Manager in automated flow due to: (1) Design Style step is a MODAL overlay (not inline step), requiring different navigation; (2) Skip Sample Data button lacks data-testid; (3) Initial agent context provided incorrect testid prefix for template cards. Recommend main agent verify Step 4 manually and add the missing data-testids.
